How are futures/options/warrants addressed in ETF 03064 documentation?

The Manager may invest no more than 10% of the Sub-Fund’s net asset value (the “Net Asset Value”) in futures for investment and hedging purposes, where the Manager believes such investments will help the Sub-Fund achieve its investment objective and are beneficial to the Sub-Fund. The futures in which the Sub-Fund may invest will be index futures which exhibit high correlation with the Index in order to manage the Sub-Fund’s exposure to the Index constituents.
